title: Issue with SPARQL select query with an optional clause
description:
Hi,
I'm using Virtuoso 7.2.4.2 on a Debian 9.
The issue concerns resources that are not retrieved by a select query whereas they should. I'm using this SPARQL endpoint which contains a subpart of DBpedia with the dumps:

anchor_text_en.ttl
instance_types_en.ttl
long_abstracts_en.ttl
page_ids_en.ttl
PageRank_scores_en_grph.ttl (generated by https://github.com/dineshreddykdp/JungGraphMeasures)
disambiguations_en.ttl
instance_types_transitive_en.ttl
labels_en.ttl
mappingbased_literals_en.ttl
page_links_en.ttl
redirects_en.ttl

If I do the following query:
SELECT distinct count(distinct ?s)
    FROM <http://dbpedia.org> WHERE {
        optional {
            ?s a ?type .
        }
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRank> ?pr .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageID> ?id .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects> ?x} .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageDisambiguates> ?y} .
    }

I get 3386942 resources. Now if I do this query:
SELECT distinct count(distinct ?s)
    FROM <http://dbpedia.org> WHERE {
        ?s a ?type .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRank> ?pr .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageID> ?id .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects> ?x} .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageDisambiguates> ?y} .
    }

I get the exact same number of resources, 3386942. Which is wrong because there are resources without types in the KB, and then the number should be higher. As example, the resource http://dbpedia.org/resource/HC_CSKA_Moscow, doesn't have types and then should appears among the results of the first query, which is not the case. Nevertheless, if I run the following query:
SELECT distinct count(distinct ?s)
    FROM <http://dbpedia.org> WHERE {
        optional {
            ?s a ?type .
        }
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRank> ?pr .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageID> ?id .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects> ?x} .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageDisambiguates> ?y} .
        filter (?s = <http://dbpedia.org/resource/HC_CSKA_Moscow>) .
    }

I get a result and if I remove the optional, I get 0 results which is the normal behavior. So, is there something wrong in my first query or there is an issue with the optional clause in Virtuoso?
poc:
SELECT distinct count(distinct ?s)
    FROM <http://dbpedia.org> WHERE {
        ?s a ?type .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRank> ?pr .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageID> ?id .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects> ?x} .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageDisambiguates> ?y} .
    }

SELECT distinct count(distinct ?s)
    FROM <http://dbpedia.org> WHERE {
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRank> ?pr .
        ?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageID> ?id .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects> ?x} .
        filter not exists{?s <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageDisambiguates> ?y} .
    }
key_bug_features: SPARQL optional clause not retrieving expected resources
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_resources (id INT PRIMARY KEY, resource_uri VARCHAR(255), type_uri VARCHAR(255), page_rank FLOAT, page_id INT);
INSERT INTO test_resources (id, resource_uri, type_uri, page_rank, page_id) VALUES (1, 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/HC_CSKA_Moscow', NULL, 0.5, 12345);
INSERT INTO test_resources (id, resource_uri, type_uri, page_rank, page_id) VALUES (2, 'http://dbpedia.org/resource/Example_Resource', 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ExampleType', 0.8, 67890);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT resource_uri) FROM test_resources WHERE type_uri IS NULL OR type_uri = 'http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ExampleType';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT resource_uri) FROM test_resources WHERE page_rank > 0.7 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_resources AS r WHERE r.resource_uri = test_resources.resource_uri AND r.type_uri IS NOT NULL);
